name: Skillet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes until tender.
2. Slice them into pieces about 1/4 inch thick.
3. Mash the potatoes lightly just until broken up into several pieces.
4. Stir in the buttermilk and scallions, then season with salt and pepper.
5. Heat enough oil to coat the bottom of a non-stick skillet.
6. When the oil is hot, pour in the potato mixture and spread it evenly.
7. Turn down the heat to moderate and cook until the bottom of the pie is crisp and browned.
8. Slide the pie onto a plate and cut into wedges.
